description: The Gaussian Splat Asset Metadata component gives statistics on Gaussian Splats seen in inspectors for components that generate or provide such data.

fields.Splat: The splat to get data on.
fields.SplatCount: The number of splats in the Gaussian splat.
fields.MemoryBytes: The amount of memory in bytes the Gaussian splat takes up.
fields.FormattedMemoryBytes: The amount of memory in bytes the Gaussian splat takes up when formatted.
fields.ActualLoadedVariant: The variant of the Gaussian splat that is loaded from the cloud.
